Balenciaga Blue Ring Embroidered Striped Trim Sweatpants feature single-sided fish scale fabric woven from cotton. The front is smooth knit, while the inner side uses floating stitch knitting to create a textured terry loop for added volume and a delicate touch. The terry structure absorbs moisture well and dries quickly, maintaining shape after multiple washes. 

Embroidered on the front thigh with a 3000-stitch loop sports icon using an imported embroidery machine. The dual-axis linear guide rail ensures frame movement precision up to 0.01mm, guaranteeing exact embroidery placement. The trim runs precisely from waist to ankle, ensuring symmetry and smooth flow.

Before final sewing, ultra-fine basting stitches secure the trim to prevent shifting, twisting, or wrinkling, ensuring straight, flawless seams. Active control of cotton knit shrinkage stabilizes the fabric, enhancing dimensional stability and resistance to deformation and wrinkles.

Available sizes: S-XL.

Balenciaga CUT-UP Jeans feature custom cotton denim woven with Phantom technology, offering a vintage texture that is both exceptional and comfortable. The iconic blue denim base showcases interwoven shades of blue, reminiscent of time’s imprint. The jeans are boldly segmented, with uniquely pieced denim patches reassembled and accented by the Balenciaga logo. Sporty stripes are cleverly integrated, creating a striking yet harmonious aesthetic that blurs the line between sportswear and fashion.

The futuristic silhouette is defined by distinctive tailoring, expanding styling possibilities beyond a single look. Suitable for coordinated outfits, these jeans use imported machine embroidery with advanced computer-controlled systems and precise mechanics to deliver high-precision, smooth, and delicate Balenciaga logo stitching.

Distressed areas employ frayed-edge tearing techniques, achieved through physical abrasion at the edges for a natural worn effect. High-temperature steam and sandpaper remove fiber fuzz and color inconsistencies, producing unique holes and wear patterns. Multi-monkey sanding combined with high-pressure spraying creates localized gradient effects, followed by sanding to craft exclusive textured patterns. The intricate, labor-intensive craftsmanship includes electrochemical deep blue dyeing and stone milling washing, where electrochemical reactions alter fabric color before grinding with abrasives and hot water washing achieves the final wash effect.

Available sizes: S-XL.

Balenciaga patchwork straight-leg jeans, crafted from custom satin blue Sero woven denim. The waistband is accented with Parisian kraft paper. Balenciaga x Lamborghini embroidered custom tech polyester luxury material pants. Smooth, delicate, comfortable, and skin-friendly. Classic black as the main color tone. Balenciaga jeans embroidered denim jeans, custom-made with fine vertical bamboo pattern on dark horizontal bamboo-inspired cotton denim fabric. The fabric is delicate, comfortable, and skin-friendly, with a deep blue base featuring subtly visible dark bamboo patterns. The left leg is embellished with Balenciaga jeans embroidery, complemented by Parisian cowhide paper detailing at the back waistband, enhancing brand recognition. Black silk threads meander on the deep blue background, instantly igniting visual focus. The smooth and dynamic lines exude a retro yet modern dual temperament, outlining endless fashion possibilities. Prioritize customizing with original denim material, undergoing snowballing, salt frying, and dyeing processes. The denim material is soaked in a special solvent to absorb the dye, then washed and air-dried to further fade and oxidize. Sand frying techniques are used to naturally fade and distress the denim surface, followed by manual tools to create physical damage, maintaining the original texture and adding uniqueness. Combining rubbing and whiskering techniques, hand rubbing is done in specific areas to achieve natural crease effects, then specific tools are used to draw whisker-shaped textures for a full visual effect. Distressed areas utilize frayed edge distressing techniques, creating a natural frayed effect through physical abrasion on the edges. By combining high-temperature steam and sandpaper, fiber lint and color differences are removed, presenting unique distressed and worn effects. Sizes: XS-L.

Balenciaga BB wheat embroidery distressed shorts, made with a specific weave and washed double yarn fish scale bottom brushed fabric. Balenciaga embroidered multi-functional work pants, tailored in a custom navy blue cotton blend twill fabric, featuring multiple well-arranged dimensional pockets, with an icon embroidery on the left pocket for brand recognition. The lower part of the pants is detachable for versatile styling options. The embroidery process utilizes advanced computer control systems and precision mechanical components, with a sports icon embroidery operation. The template machine is used for opening pockets, with preset templates guiding the positioning, shape, and size of the pocket openings to ensure high-quality results. Specialized machine reverse topstitching technique for fine sewing, requiring meticulous preparation of the garment's reverse side before stitching to ensure straight lines, even stitches, and neat edges. Soft light vintage washing technique enhances the fabric's surface with a gentle sheen through specific chemical and logistical treatments, preserving the original texture while adding a touch of elegance. Sizes available: XS-L.

Balenciaga red embroidered denim jeans feature ring-spun denim fabric, artistic embroidery on the leg, back jeans patch, mid-rise design, front and back with distressed wash details, hidden button fly, belt loops with pocket, complete with all accessories. Ring-spun denim fabric is a special type of denim fabric made using ring-spun spinning technology. The fabric is tightly woven, high-strength, and has a unique appearance. The fabric is smooth, strong, durable, and has a soft and flexible texture, while maintaining abrasion resistance. Ring-spun yarn has a smooth surface and high strength, resulting in a sturdy denim fabric with better drape and unique texture. It is lighter, more breathable, and has a vintage worn effect compared to regular denim. The embroidery is precise and dense, with clear patterns and strong lines. The linen thread combined with dense stitching creates a subtle matte visual texture, giving the embroidery a full and three-dimensional effect. The fine stitching and unique design add depth to the minimalist design. The imported water-based printing material has strong color fastness and permeability, especially effective on cotton fabrics. The details between prints are well-handled with no rough edges or bleeding. The technology-treated printing material penetrates the fabric clearly, enhancing the fabric's texture. The design reinterprets classic workwear with a futuristic perspective, combining the roughness of ring-spun denim with technological functionality. The jeans have a loose fit at the hips, a slightly tapered leg from thigh to ankle, balancing a relaxed feel with clean lines. The elastic triangle insert at the back waist ensures a snug fit during movement and a loose silhouette at rest. Sizes: XS-L.
